emergency_routing_rules.fallback_action: If unable to connect, take full details and emergency dispatch will call back within 10 minutes

call_transfer_rules.failure_message: I'm unable to reach our emergency team right now. I have all your information and dispatch will contact you within 10 minutes.

integration_constraints: Do not create work orders in ServiceTrade for emergency sprinkler calls
All emergency calls must be logged in dispatch system manually
